```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const w = Inputs.range([-8, 8], { value: 0.5, step: 0.5, label: null });
  const b = Inputs.range([-4.5, 4.5], { value: 0, step: 0.5, label: null });

  function compactRow(name, input) {
    input.style.width = "100%";
    input.style.margin = "0";

    return html`<div style="
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.9rem 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      column-gap: 0.4rem;
    ">
      <span>${name}</span>
      ${input}
    </div>`;
  }

  const controls = html`<div style="
    width: 220px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
  "></div>`;

  controls.append(
    compactRow("w", w),
    compactRow("b", b)
  );

  const plotHost = html`<div></div>`;

  function render() {
    const wv = w.value;
    const bv = b.value;

    const xMin = -10, xMax = 10;
    const xs = d3.range(xMin, xMax, 0.05);

    const invalid = wv === 0;
    const x0 = invalid ? null : -bv / wv;
    const x0Clamped = invalid ? null : Math.max(xMin, Math.min(x0, xMax));

    const boxWidth = (xMax - xMin) * 0.55;

    const c1 = "rgba(186, 228, 179, 0.2)";
    const c0 = "rgba(158, 202, 225, 0.2)";

    let curveData, axisData, leftColor, rightColor, boundaryMark, thresholdMark, titleText;

if (invalid) {
  const pred = activation(bv);

  curveData = null;
  axisData  = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, pred }));

  leftColor = pred === 1 ? c1 : c0;
  rightColor = leftColor;

  boundaryMark = null;
  thresholdMark = null;
  titleText = `No decision boundary`;
} else {
      curveData = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, y: activation(wv * xi + bv) }));
      axisData  = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, pred: activation(wv * xi + bv) }));

      leftColor  = activation(wv * xMin + bv) ? c1 : c0;
      rightColor = activation(wv * xMax + bv) ? c1 : c0;

      boundaryMark = Plot.ruleX([x0Clamped], {
        stroke: "black",
        strokeDasharray: "4,4"
      });

      thresholdMark = Plot.dot([{ x: x0Clamped }], {
        x: "x",
        y: 0.5,
        fill: "black",
        r: 5
      });

      titleText = `Decision boundary at x₀ = ${x0.toFixed(2)}`;
    }

    const title = html`<div style="
      text-align:center;
      font-size:0.95rem;
      margin-bottom:6px;
    ">${titleText}</div>`;

    const plot = Plot.plot({
      width: 640,
      height: 380,
      x: { label: "x", domain: [xMin, xMax] },
      y: { label: "activation(wx + b)", domain: [-0.05, 1.05] },
      style: { background: "white" },
      marks: [
        Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: xMin,
          x2: invalid ? xMax : x0Clamped,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: leftColor
        }),
        !invalid && Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: x0Clamped,
          x2: xMax,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: rightColor
        }),
        invalid && Plot.rect(
          [{
            x1: -boxWidth / 2,
            x2: boxWidth / 2,
            y1: 0.28,
            y2: 0.78
          }],
          {
            x1: "x1",
            x2: "x2",
            y1: "y1",
            y2: "y2",
            fill: "white",
            fillOpacity: 0.9,
            stroke: "black",
            strokeWidth: 1
          }
        ),
        !invalid && Plot.line(curveData, {
          x: "x",
          y: "y",
          stroke: "black",
          strokeWidth: 3
        }),
        boundaryMark,
        //thresholdMark,
        Plot.dot(axisData, {
          x: "x",
          y: 0,
          fill: d => d.pred === 1 ? "#bae4b3" : "#9ecae1",
          r: 2.5
        }),
        invalid && Plot.text(
          [{
            x: 0,
            y: 0.53,
            label: "No decision boundary :)\nThis is because w = 0\n\nTherefore, we choose based only on b\nIf b >= 0, choose 1, otherwise 0."
          }],
          {
            x: "x",
            y: "y",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 14,
            fill: "black"
          }
        )
      ].filter(Boolean)
    });

    plotHost.replaceChildren(
      html`<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;"></div>`
    );

    plotHost.firstChild.append(title, plot);
  }

  w.addEventListener("input", render);
  b.addEventListener("input", render);
  render();

  const row = html`<div style="
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 24px;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  "></div>`;

  row.append(controls, plotHost);

  return row;
}
```
